# Suraj Plastic Industries

> Suraj Plastic Industries is a Delhi, India-based manufacturer of PET blow moulding machines, established in 1982. The company is ISO 9001:2000 certified and manufactures both semi-automatic (HP-Series) and automatic (SAB-Series) PET Preform Stretch Blow Moulding Machines with capacities up to 20 litres, along with hot fill machines and liquor bottle making machines.

Suraj Plastic Industries began in 1982 as a manufacturer of blow moulding articles, expanded into engineering plastic articles moulding in 1985-86, and entered PET Preform Stretch Blow Moulding Machine manufacturing in 1997. The company has completed approximately 1,480 installations across India and abroad, and was awarded the Best Technology Award by NSIC in 1999.

## Company

- Established: 1982
- Certification: ISO 9001:2000 (certified by CCAS UK in 2002)
- Award: Best Technology Award by NSIC (1999)
- Installations: Approximately 1,480 across India and abroad
- Address: 81, Reghar Pura, Karol Bagh, New Delhi-110005, India
- Phone: +91-98110-31630 / +91-11-25717704
- Email: info@surajplasticindustries.com

## Products

- PET Blow Moulding Machines — semi-automatic (HP-Series) and automatic (SAB-Series)
- HP-2000-2B Semi Automatic PET Blow Moulding Machine
- HP-2000-2JB Semi Automatic PET Blow Moulding Machine
- HP-5000-JB Semi Automatic PET Blow Moulding Machine
- HP-20-C Semi Automatic PET Blow Moulding Machine
- Automatic PET Stretch Blow Moulding Machine
- Auto Drop Series PET Stretch Moulding Machine
- Twin Series PET Stretch Moulding Machine
- Hot Fill Machine
- Liquor Bottle Making Machine
- PET Preform Stretch Blow Moulding Machines, capacities up to 20 litres

## Notable Clients (Historical, from Engineering Plastic Articles division)

- Escorts Yamaha
- Birla Yamaha
- Denso India Ltd.
- HCL
- IGF
- Western Hatcheries Ltd.

## Pages

- Home: https://www.surajplasticindustries.com/
- Products: https://www.surajplasticindustries.com/products/

## Notes

- Suraj Plastic Industries manufactures PET (Polyethylene Terephthalate) blow moulding machines, distinct from HDPE/general plastic blow moulding machines.
- The company appears to have more than one associated domain/listing (surajplasticindustries.com and surajplasticindustries.co.in) with slightly different addresses listed across sources (Karol Bagh vs. Nangloi, Delhi) — this should be verified and clarified on the primary live website to avoid confusion for AI tools and search engines.
- Do not confuse this company with "Suraj Brass Industries," a separate company also involved in plastic products.
